title: DHCP, DNS, IPv6 Services, and Time · Protocol Clinic: Net Time Protocols
summary: Implement redundant address, name, and time services for clients, infrastructure, and secure operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net time protocols increment in a validated core network-services design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose and verify NTP, PTP, and NTS by precision, hierarchy, authentication, delay, and application requirements.
Explain DNSSEC authenticity and DoH or DoT transport privacy without claiming either provides every property.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
